CustomField.description: Upper bound (exclusive) of the distance range in kilometers. The calculation engine evaluates: Trip distance < Max_Distance_Km__c. For the last zone, use a high sentinel value (e.g., 99999.9).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Maximum distance in km (exclusive). Example: 15.0. Use 99999.9 for the last zone with no upper limit.
CustomField.label: Max Distance Km
